uplink.description: Nominal soil reading (synthetic in-bounds; expected from upstream-codec.js field values, normalized)
uplink._note: Upstream decodeUplink returns {field1:3.3,field2:35,field3:25,field4:1500,field5:7,field6:3.6}; field2->soil.moisture, field3->soil.temperature, field4 uS/cm /1000->soil.ec, field5->soil.pH, field1->battery, field6 (ms/1000=s)->transmitInterval extra.

uplink.description: Negative soil temperature (synthetic in-bounds; exercises two's-complement sign extension)
Significant validity flag clear (bytes[3]=0) returns an error
uplink._note: Upstream returns {Significant: "data invalid"} when bytes[3] is falsy; normalized to an error.

uplink.description: Truncated payload (fewer than 16 bytes) returns an error
uplink._note: Length guard; upstream would read undefined bytes and produce NaN.
